'''Oryon''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Bothan/Legends|Bothan]] [[Spy/Legends|spy]] who worked for the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Republic]] [[Republic Intelligence/Legends|Intelligence]] during the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]] and later the [[Erased]].

==Biography==
[[File:Last_of_the_Jedi_by_Chris_Scalf.jpg|thumb|[[Dexter Jettster/Legends|Dexter Jettster]], [[Curran Caladian]], Oryon and [[Keets Freely]].]]

After [[Supreme Chancellor/Legends|Chancellor]] [[Palpatine/Legends|Palpatine]] [[Declaration of a New Order|reorganized]] the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Republic]] into the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]], Oryon joined the [[Erased]]. When a group of [[Stormtrooper/Legends|stormtroopers]] attacked a base of the Erased, he helped save his friends, but not all of them. He traveled with [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]] [[Fy-Tor-Ana]] to rescue [[Ferus Olin]], and with them helped temporarily rid [[Naboo/Legends|Naboo]] of Imperial presence. Oryon later helped Fy-Tor-Ana rescue two of Ferus's friends, [[Roan Lands]] and [[Dona Telamark]], from the government on [[Bellassa/Legends|Bellassa]], with help from [[The Eleven]]. Oryon was [[Death/Legends|killed]] when [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Darth Vader]] [[Twilight (operation)|destroyed]] the [[Jedi asteroid|asteroid]].

{{Char-stub}}

==Equipment==
Oryon was known to use a light [[Repeating blaster/Legends|Repeating blaster]]
